jbt.dialog.title: Jake's Build Tools
jbt.dialog.description: Adds a bunch of craftable tools that help make building easier! Trowel, chisel, hammer and so much more!
jbt.book.block_wrench_description: Wrenches can rotate any block that has rotation. Even works on filled containers!
jbt.book.chisel_description: Chisels replace the targeted block with the one in your offhand. Available in copper, iron and diamond.
jbt.book.experience_flask_description: These flasks can be filled with all of your current experience. Once filled, they can be smashed to retrieve it.
jbt.book.grass_starter_description: Used to convert blocks into their grassy variants. Can be replenished by reverting the conversion.
jbt.book.hammer_description: A netherite-level tool that can break 9 blocks at a time. Can be repaired with copper ingots.
jbt.book.hardhat_description: A helmet that increases reach by 2 blocks when worn. Also protects you from falling blocks!
jbt.book.item_magnet_description: When held in your hand, item magnets will attract items within 7 blocks towards you. Also works in item frames.
jbt.book.mining_helmet_description: A helmet that gives off light like a torch. Also protects you from falling blocks!
jbt.book.mob_bag_description: Mob bags can store any non-hostile mob safely inside them! The mob's name will be shown on the tooltip.
jbt.book.rope_ladder_description: Descends down when placed, using others in your inventory. All ladders are retrieved when the top breaks.
jbt.book.tape_measure_description: Measures distance between blocks, recording results on the tooltip. Shift right-click to reset the results!
jbt.book.trowel_description: Trowels place blocks randomly from your hotbar. Available in copper, iron and diamond.
jbt.book.void_bucket_description: Void buckets destroy any liquid inside of them. Can be used on powdered snow and cauldrons!
jbt.book.void_bundle_description: A bundle that destroys anything placed inside of it. Can be right clicked to retrieve the last item destroyed.
